scripts.build: pnpm --filter @kvis/mirion run build && pnpm --filter @kvis/mirion-chart run build && pnpm --filter @kvis/mirion-cli run build
scripts.build:demo: pnpm run build && GITHUB_PAGES=1 pnpm --filter mirion-demo run build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @kvis/mirion-chart run test && pnpm --filter @kvis/mirion-cli run test
scripts.deploy: pnpm run build:demo && pnpm exec gh-pages -d demo/dist -b gh-pages
